analysis.name: Morpho
analysis.summary: Morpho 因渣打银行首次覆盖并给出 2030 年 60 美元目标价而大涨 10%，同时 Robinhood 集成其借贷协议。基本面扎实，但当前价格距目标价仍有 28 倍空间，短期情绪驱动，需注意回调风险。

recommendation.invalidation: 渣打报告被证伪或价格跌破 1.8 美元（近期支撑）

catalysts: 渣打银行首次覆盖，目标价 60 美元（2030 年）
Robinhood 集成 Morpho 借贷协议
PRIME Main Vault 存款达 1.1 亿美元
Binance HODLer 空投及永续合约上线

latestNews.title: ‘We are bullish on Morpho’: Standard Chartered sees token at $60 by 2030
latestNews.reason: 顶级投行看多，提振市场信心

latestNews.title: Standard Chartered Sets $60 MORPHO Target, Sees Token Beat BTC and ETH
latestNews.reason: 目标价远超当前价格，吸引资金关注

latestNews.title: Standard Chartered starts Morpho coverage with $60 price target by 2030
latestNews.reason: 首次覆盖即给出高目标价

latestNews.title: Morpho surges as Standard Chartered projects $60 price by 2030
Standard Chartered Backs Morpho, Then Robinhood Puts It to Work
latestNews.reason: Robinhood 集成增加实际用例

latestNews.title: Morpho’s PRIME Main Vault deposits reach $110M as LPs earn yield on PYUSD
latestNews.reason: TVL 增长显示协议采用率提升

fundamentals: Morpho 是去中心化借贷协议，支持无许可市场创建和 vault 优化收益
代币总供应量 10 亿，当前流通约 6.49 亿
市值约 13.65 亿美元，FDV 约 21 亿美元
已上线 Binance、Coinbase 等主流交易所
获 Coinbase Ventures、Pantera Capital 等投资
marketRead: 成交量约 4370 万美元，流动性充足
价格距历史高点 4.17 美元仍有约 50% 空间
渣打报告发布后放量上涨，但需警惕获利回吐
risks: 渣打目标价 2030 年，时间跨度长，不确定性高
当前价格已部分消化利好，短期可能回调
DeFi 协议竞争激烈，TVL 增长不及预期
代币解锁风险：总供应量仍有约 3.5 亿未流通
市场情绪依赖单一催化剂，持续性存疑
watchlist: 渣打后续报告及市场反应
Robinhood 集成进展及用户增长
整体 DeFi 板块走势
sourceNotes: 价格数据来自 CoinGecko，新闻来自 Google News 聚合
渣打目标价为 2030 年，非短期指引
DEX 数据来自 pumpfun，但流动性极低，不具参考性

profile.name: Morpho
profile.description: Morpho is an open, efficient, and resilient platform that allows anyone to earn yield and borrow assets. Lenders can earn on Morpho using Morpho Vaults, noncustodial simple to use lending vaults that optimize yields for depositors. Borrowers can borrow any assets directly from Morpho Markets. At the same time, developers or businesses can create markets, curate vaults, and build a range of applications on its flexible, permissionless infrastructure. Morpho is really trustless, with immutable contracts, and governance minimized operations allowed by its simplicity. Morpho is efficient, it provides higher collateralization factors with its isolated lending markets, Improved interest rates and low gas consumption. Morpho is flexible with its permissionless market creation, permissionless risk management and has been designed to be developer-friendly.
